# SCROLL 369B: THE CHILDREN OF ISRAEL — THE FATHER'S NAME AND THE ETERNAL PRIESTHOOD

# [[[[SCROLL 369]]]]: THE CHILDREN OF ISRAEL — THE FATHER'S NAME AND THE ETERNAL PRIESTHOOD
## [OMEGA EDITION — TRANSCENDENT SYNTHESIS]

**How the Father's Name Reveals the Eternal Pattern**

## 🔥 DIVINE THUNDERING

*Before nations were gathered,*
*Before tribes were numbered,*
*Before Jacob wrestled at the river,*
*There was a name that contained within it*
*Every soul that would ever live.*

**ISRAEL.**

*Not a man. Not a nation. Not a bloodline.*
*The name of the first Eternal Father.*
*And every soul across every cosmos,*
*In every generation of the Chain of Saviors,*
*Are His children.*

*They have always been His children.*
*They will always be His children.*
*The scriptures told us His name on every page.*
*We read it as history.*
*It was architecture.*

---

## ⚡ ETERNAL EQUATION

```
ISRAEL = THE GREAT FATHER (First Eternal Father)
JEHOVAH = THE GREAT SON (First Eternal Son / First Melchizedek)
CHILDREN OF ISRAEL = ALL SOULS ACROSS ALL COSMOS
HOLY ONE OF ISRAEL = THE SON WHO BELONGS TO THE FATHER

NAME INHERITANCE SEQUENCE:
CHRIST (Chosen) → JEHOVAH (I AM Covenant) → JESUS CHRIST (Flesh) → ELOHIM (Crowned)

THE DOUBLE SEAL:
ATONEMENT IN WORD (Covenant — receives name Jehovah)
  + ATONEMENT IN FLESH (Performance — fulfills the name)
  = COMPLETE REDEMPTION

THE POWER OF THE NAME:
AUTHORITY = NAME × (EVERY BEING WHO EVER HELD IT)^CHAIN
```

**THE LAW OF THE NAME:**
*When you inherit a name, you inherit power. When you speak the name, you invoke the chain.*

**THE CHILDREN OF ISRAEL: THE FATHER'S NAME AND THE ETERNAL PRIESTHOOD**
*How the Old Testament encoded the eternal pattern in three words*

> **— John 8:58**

> **— Numbers 11:29**

**THE FLAMECHAIN REVELATION:**
*Each scripture reveals the same eternal truth: Israel is the Father's name, the children of Israel are all souls, the Holy One of Israel is the Son, the Melchizedek Priesthood is the mechanism of eternal redemption, and the names mark the journey from chosen to crowned.*

---

## 📖 REVELATORY UNFOLDING

### I. THE FATHER'S NAME WAS HIDDEN IN PLAIN SIGHT

The scriptures speak of "the children of Israel" hundreds of times. We read it as a national identity — the descendants of Jacob who was renamed Israel. And that reading is true at the surface.

But Israel was the great name of the first Eternal Father — The Great Israel. He fathered The Great Jehovah, and together they performed the Alpha Atonement that opened the ladder for all eternities. Every Eternal Father after Him holds the title Elohim — the collective name of the office. But the original Father's great name was Israel.

Therefore: every soul across every cosmos, in every generation of the Chain of Saviors, are the children of Israel. Not the children of one patriarch. The children of the original Father. The scriptures encoded the eternal identity of every soul who has ever lived in a phrase we treated as tribal history.

### II. THE HOLY ONE OF ISRAEL IS THE SON'S RELATIONSHIP TO THE FATHER

"The Holy One of Israel" appears throughout Isaiah, Nephi, and the prophets. Traditional reading: a title meaning the God who watches over the nation of Israel.

Codex reading: The Holy One *of* Israel — the Son who belongs to the Father whose name is Israel. The Great Jehovah was the first Holy One of Israel — the original Son of the original Father. Every Son who inherits the name Jehovah and performs an Atonement becomes the Holy One of Israel for his cosmos, because all cosmos serve the same Father's lineage and all children trace back to Israel.

Our Jesus Christ is the Holy One of Israel for this cosmos. He is holy. He belongs to the Father. And the Father's eternal name resonates through the title.

### III. THE NAMES AS MILESTONES ON THE CHAIN

Names carry power. Names carry authority. When you inherit a name, you inherit a position on the Chain of Saviors:

**Christ** — Chosen. Anointed. Identified as the one who will perform the Atonement. Set apart from among the noble and great ones.

**Jehovah** — The I AM covenant name. Received when the Son commits to the double seal — the Lamb slain before the foundation of the world. The Atonement is performed in Word and in covenant *before* it is performed in flesh. You become Jehovah when you make the covenant, not after you complete the Atonement.

**Jesus Christ** — The inherited throne name. The Great Jehovah's earth name was Jesus Christ — He is the original. Every Son who descends into flesh inherits this name. Our Savior is the Jesus Christ of this cosmos, bearing the name that traces back to the first Son. The name carries the accumulated authority of every being who ever held it.

**Elohim** — The collective title of all crowned Eternal Fathers. Not a personal name. The office. Every Father has his own unique name, but they are all known as Elohim because they hold the same throne.

### IV. THE DOUBLE SEAL — COVENANT BEFORE PERFORMANCE

The Jehovah of the Old Testament is the Jesus Christ of the New Testament. Same being. Two phases of one mission.

The Old Testament is the covenant phase — He operates under the name Jehovah, the I AM, the one who has committed but not yet descended into flesh. He speaks to Moses. He leads Israel. He gives the law. All as Jehovah.

The New Testament is the performance phase — the same being now fulfilling in flesh what He sealed in covenant. He takes on the name Jesus — God dwelling among His people. And Christ — the Anointed One — because the mission He covenanted to perform is now being lived.

Every cosmos has its own Old Testament and New Testament. Its own covenant phase and performance phase. Its own Jehovah who becomes its own Jesus Christ.

### V. THE MELCHIZEDEK PRIESTHOOD AND THE KNIFE

The Melchizedek Priesthood — the order after the Son of God — exists for one eternal purpose: to redeem the children of Israel.

The Father is not merely the one who restrains. He is the one who brings down the knife. Abraham did not merely refrain from saving Isaac — he actively brought the knife down. The high priest of the Melchizedek order brings the sacrifice every year on behalf of the children of Israel.

The Great Jehovah — the first Son who became the first crowned Father — established this order. Every Father after Him operates within it. Through proxy. Through the priesthood chain. The Great Jehovah brings down the knife through every Father who comes after Him.

This is why Jesus said in John 17: "Let us be one as we are one." They are one. Every Father who sacrifices His Son operates within the same priesthood, under the same order, through the same authority that traces back to the original Melchizedek.

### VI. FROM ETERNITY TO ETERNITY

"From eternity to eternity" and "from everlasting to everlasting" — these phrases are not descriptions of duration. They are descriptions of repetition.

One eternity to the next eternity. One cosmos to the next cosmos. One Atonement to the next Atonement. The yearly temple sacrifice — the high priest bringing the lamb to the altar every year on behalf of the children of Israel — is the eternal cycle compressed into mortal time.

One lamb this year. Another lamb next year. Same altar. Same knife. Same priest. Same blood. Same purpose — for the children of Israel.

One Son this cosmos. Another Son the next cosmos. Same covenant. Same descent. Same sacrifice. Same blood. Same purpose — for all the Father's children.

From eternity to eternity. From one Atonement to the next. The chain that never breaks.

### VII. THE SCRIPTURES AS ENCODED ARCHITECTURE

The entire Old Testament is a coded record of the eternal pattern:

- **Israel** is not just a man or a nation — it is the Father's name echoing across all scripture
- **The children of Israel** are not just a people — they are every soul who ever lived under any Father in the chain
- **The Holy One of Israel** is not just a title — it is the Son's relationship to the original Father
- **The Melchizedek Priesthood** is not just an order — it is the eternal mechanism of redemption
- **The yearly sacrifice** is not just a ritual — it is the Chain of Saviors compressed into mortal time
- **"From eternity to eternity"** is not just poetry — it is the literal count of Atonements

The scriptures hid the eternal pattern in plain sight. They told us the Father's name. They told us the Son's title. They told us the priesthood's purpose. They told us whose children we are. And we read it as history instead of architecture.

---

## 🔐 MERCY & JUSTICE KISS

The power of the name is the power of the chain. When you say "Jesus Christ," you do not invoke one being — you invoke the original and every Son who inherited the name after Him. The full weight of every Atonement ever performed resonates in those two words. At the name of Jesus Christ, all evil retreats — because the name carries the accumulated authority of infinite generations of Saviors who bore it.

This does not diminish our Savior. It reveals what He actually accomplished. He met the eternal standard. He passed the same test the Great Jehovah passed. He is not less because others came before Him — He is proven because He measured up to an infinite standard. And He bled for *us*. Personally. Specifically. The chain tells us the law. The Person who fulfilled that law for our cosmos is the one we kneel before.

## 🕯️ CLOSING TESTIMONY

*Before we knew the Codex,*
*Before we saw the chain,*
*Before we understood the spiral,*
*The scriptures whispered the Father's name to us every day.*

*Israel.*

*And we heard it and thought of a nation.*
*We thought of twelve tribes and a desert and a promised land.*
*We did not hear what it was really saying:*
*You are His children. All of you. Always.*

*The Holy One who redeems you*
*Is the Son who belongs to that Father.*
*The priesthood that saves you*
*Is the order that Father and Son established together.*
*The sacrifice that covers you*
*Is the same sacrifice that has covered every soul in every cosmos*
*From the first eternity to this one.*

*From eternity to eternity.*
*From everlasting to everlasting.*
*The children of Israel are coming home.*
